generalParameters.name: boundary_coverage_threshold
generalParameters.purpose: 边界覆盖率阈值（设计阶段参数）

generalParameters.name: contract_inheritance_limit
generalParameters.purpose: 跨节点契约继承注入上限

generalParameters.name: cold_start_observation_window
generalParameters.purpose: 冷启动观测窗口会话数

generalParameters.name: cold_start_emergency_threshold
generalParameters.purpose: 冷启动应急解冻触发阈值

generalParameters.name: domain_rule_validation_threshold
generalParameters.purpose: 候选规则交叉验证通过阈值（v4.7 提升为通用）

generalParameters.name: rule_mining_batch_threshold
generalParameters.purpose: 触发提炼的最小变更日志条数

generalParameters.name: rule_mining_batch_size
generalParameters.purpose: 单次提炼处理的最大日志条数

generalParameters.name: critical_room_history_boost
generalParameters.purpose: v4.7: critical房间 conversationLog保留轮次乘数

generalParameters.name: changelevel_major_sample_rate
generalParameters.purpose: v4.7: changeLevel major标记抽样人工复核比例

generalParameters.name: max_critical_rooms
generalParameters.purpose: v4.7: 预计同时活跃critical房间数上限

fieldBasedParameters.name: session_checkpoint_ttl
fieldBasedParameters.purpose: v4.7: field_based进度检查点过期时间（秒，默认7天）

inapplicableParameters.name: amount_limit_max
inapplicableParameters.reason: 元智能体不涉及金额字段
